title: Photo Metadata Sidecar
description: Per-photo metadata sidecar file. Placed alongside each photo as <photoname>.meta.json. Created lazily on first write; absence means all fields take their default/unknown values.

version.description: Schema version. Starts at 1, incremented on any schema change.

capturedAt.description: When the photo was taken, from EXIF or file creation time. ISO 8601. Null if unknown.

duplicateGroupId.description: UUID linking photos that are duplicates of the same logical image. Null if not part of a group.

isPreferred.description: True if this is the display-preferred version within its duplicate group.

crawlSteps.description: Records which processing steps have run on this file and when. Keys are step names (e.g. 'metadata', 'duplicates').

version.description: Version of the step that produced this result.

completedAt.description: When this step completed for this file. ISO 8601.
